title: SKILL.md Frontmatter Schema
description: YAML frontmatter fields for a Ship smart skill (SKILL.md). Fields marked 'ship' are Ship-specific extensions beyond the agentskills.io base spec.

name.description: Skill id. Lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens. No leading/trailing/consecutive hyphens. Used as the skill id when no stable-id is set.

description.description: One sentence describing when to use this skill. Start with 'Use when...' for reliable trigger matching.

stable-id.description: [Ship] Stable storage key for variable state. Survives directory renames. Defaults to the directory name if absent.

tags.description: [Ship] Category labels for discovery on getship.dev.

compatibility.description: Comma-separated provider names this skill is compatible with. Omit for universal compatibility.

allowed-tools.description: MCP tool names the skill requires. Space-delimited in YAML, array in JSON.

artifacts.description: [Ship] Artifact types this skill produces. The platform infers rendering and interaction capabilities from these types.
